hooks.command: root="$PWD"; relative='.agents/skills/setup-project-agents/scripts/check_recommended_tools.sh'; while [ "$root" != "/" ] && [ ! -f "$root/$relative" ]; do root=$(dirname -- "$root"); done; if [ -f "$root/$relative" ]; then sh "$root/$relative" hook --platform codex; fi
hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = (Get-Location).Path; $relative = '.agents\skills\setup-project-agents\scripts\check_recommended_tools.ps1'; while ($root -and -not (Test-Path -LiteralPath (Join-Path $root $relative))) { $parent = Split-Path -Path $root -Parent; if (-not $parent -or $parent -eq $root) { $root = $null } else { $root = $parent } }; if ($root) { & (Join-Path $root $relative) hook --platform codex }"
